title: Maan ympäri 80 päivässä
summaries: "Maan ympäri 80 päivässä" by Jules Verne is an adventure novel first published in 1872. When wealthy London gentleman Phileas Fogg wagers half his fortune that he can circle the globe in eighty days, he embarks on a precisely timed journey with his new valet Passepartout. But a determined detective mistakes Fogg for a bank robber and shadows their every move. Racing against the clock through India, Hong Kong, America, and beyond, they face elephants, rescues, missed connections, and dangerous obstacles that threaten their impossible deadline. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
